properties.name: outbox.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of outbox messages fetched and published per polling cycle. Defaults to 100.

properties.name: outbox.polling-interval-ms
properties.description: How often (in milliseconds) the poller checks for new outbox messages. Defaults to 1000 ms.

properties.name: outbox.processing-strategy
properties.description: Strategy to apply after a message is successfully published to Kafka. Accepted values: {@code delete} (default) or {@code mark-as-processed}.
